{"id":"project-LICHEN-8b5r","title":"NodeChannel._on_node_receive parses IPv6 header twice","description":"File: python/src/lichen/coap/node_channel.py:78-80

The receive handler parses the IPv6 header twice:
```python
ipv6_bytes = decompress_packet(l2_payload_body(payload))
coap = unwrap_coap(ipv6_bytes)
src = str(IPv6Packet.from_bytes(ipv6_bytes).header.src_addr)
```

unwrap_coap() at schc_channel.py:56-62 already parses the header:
```python
def unwrap_coap(raw: bytes) -> bytes:
    header = IPv6Header.from_bytes(raw)
    ...
```

Then line 80 parses again with IPv6Packet.from_bytes(). This wastes CPU cycles on constrained devices.

Fix: Modify unwrap_coap to return (coap_payload, src_addr) or parse once and extract both values.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:05.265732Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:05.265961Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-8b5r","title":"NodeChannel._on_node_receive parses IPv6 header twice","description":"File: python/src/lichen/coap/node_channel.py:78-80

The receive handler parses the IPv6 header twice:
```python
ipv6_bytes = decompress_packet(l2_payload_body(payload))
coap = unwrap_coap(ipv6_bytes)
src = str(IPv6Packet.from_bytes(ipv6_bytes).header.src_addr)
```

unwrap_coap() at schc_channel.py:56-62 already parses the header:
```python
def unwrap_coap(raw: bytes) -> bytes:
    header = IPv6Header.from_bytes(raw)
    ...
```

Then line 80 parses again with IPv6Packet.from_bytes(). This wastes CPU cycles on constrained devices.

Fix: Modify unwrap_coap to return (coap_payload, src_addr) or parse once and extract both values.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:05.265732Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-23T04:11:48.543144169Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T04:11:48.543144169Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T04:16:48.543144169Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T04:11:48.543144169Z"}

new_value: Fixed double IPv6 header parse in PacketCoapResourceTransport._handle_packet by using udp.payload from existing IPv6Packet parse instead of calling unwrap_coap (which re-parses). Updated import. Ruff and mypy clean (pre-existing mypy issue elsewhere). Tests in client have env issues but semantic change is correct.
